title: Mini Metal Spatula 2 Pieces for Kitchen Use, Serving and Turning - Ideal for Pancakes, Brownies, Desserts, Cookie, Eggs or Small Pan
features: Multiple Use Serving Spatula: This small spatula easy to flip food such as crepes, pie, beef patties, eggs, biscuits, burgers, brownies, etc., and also convenient to cut lasagna, pizza, brownies, etc., blade sharp. You can enjoy cooking and make delicious food for your family or friends.

Mini Serving Spatula: This package includes 2 metal spatulas, 1 slotted spatula, and 1 solid spatula, 8 x 1.7 inches. This small spatula is such a handy size. It’s perfect for cutting and serving brownies, quiche, cornbread, etc. Also it’s perfect for serving anything our of a pyrex dish.

More Safe and Healthy: Metal spatula is made of food grade stainless steel material, it is rather sturdy and has a nice quality to it. The handle is made of rubber and plastic, and has no odd smell and can handle high-temperature cooking.

Practical Edge Design : Thin and flexible edge,is ideal for flipping. The edge of the blade is very thin and so works great at getting under thin cookies and crepes. In addition the front edge which is very useful to scrape off those food bits from cast iron and carbon steel pans.

Premium Service: Your satisfaction with this small spatula is our number one priority. If you don't feel satisfied with your Mini Serving Spatula, please simply contact us and we will solve all your concerns within 24 hours until you are happy with your mini spatula.
